reviews.review_description:
Connect the stars, explore the sky, admire. Calm, contemplative, and visually beautiful.
Constellations: Touch the Stars particularly impressed me with its elegant simplicity and its ability to immerse the user in the immensity of the night sky.
No timer, no fierce competition, just you, your hands, and the stars.
Drawing a line between two stars, watching the constellation rise before you, discovering an ancient symbol: all of this creates a feeling of pure wonder.
The hand tracking support, the fluidity of the gestures, and the dynamic position of the sky based on your location are choices that enhance the immersion.
All 88 official constellations are at your fingertips!
A beautiful meditative, educational, and relaxing experience from Parietal Lab, who previously offered us an excellent app with similar gameplay, Connectome.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words @Majerik! I'm glad to hear this resonated with you and brought you a relaxing experience!

reviews.review_description: I like the concept but please add quest 3 controller support! Handtracking is so unprecise and laggy. Other than that the game needs so many hand gestures i am not able to remember.

developer_response.body: Hi @Kror_de - thanks for taking time to leave this message! This is great feedback. I plan to refine the hand gestures so that you don't feel like you have to remember them, AND I'll be adding controller support soon. Please feel free to join the Discord if you want to share more feedback  - https://discord.gg/3ay2f9k4NV. Thanks!

reviews.review_title: A magical way to explore the heavens
reviews.review_description:
CONSTELLATIONS is one of those rare experiences that immediately slows you down... in a good way!  There is nothing yelling for your action or attention, as the game simply asks you to look up. 

As you scan the sky, constellations gently reveal themselves. You reach out, and connect the dots one line at a time.  A harmonious bridge from the game we played in our youth, to relaxing educational fun for all ages, all set to a tranquil soundscape. 

The design is beautifully restrained. Visuals appear only when needed, and are clear and readable, guidance is minimal, and the ambient soundtrack offers a meditative rhythm.  

The developer takes a bold step to use new hand tracked gestures, which once learned, add value to the experience. 

I reached out to the developer concerning guidance for some of the new interactions, and he responded immediately, also informing me of the roadmap.

This is the kind of virtual experience that deserves attention... because it offers a relaxing escape.  Its in early access, yet well worth the price of a cup of coffee, and a game I will often revisit when a few moments of escape are needed.

developer_response.body:
Hi @jefftheXRMan - thanks so much for sharing your experience and for reaching out directly! It's great to hear how this resonated with you :) 

AND, I'll be rolling out an update in the next few days that includes a lightweight walkthrough of the hand interactions/gestures to make sure everyone knows how to navigate this environment from the beginning! Will make sure you know when the update goes live!

reviews.review_description: This is a very relaxing and chill ”connect the dots” experience. It’s cool that it’s the real night sky you’re exploring. The handtracking feels very solid. But sometimes it’s hard to reach the lower stars depending on how you sit. Would love a lay down mode!

developer_response.body: Glad to see/hear this is relaxing @Sandstedt! AND lay down mode is definitely on the roadmap! For those hard to reach stars... try the pinch+drag gesture to move the entire sky around you.

reviews.review_title: Excellent way to learn the stars!
reviews.review_description: i've always wanted to learn the constellations but i could never visualize them in my mind, building them like an art project is really helping me understand!

developer_response.body: Thanks @DancerGrande - glad you're enjoying CONSTELLATIONS and learning at the same time!
